properties.name: camel.opentelemetry2.disable-core-processors
properties.description: Disable any inner core processors (any core DSL processor provided in the route, for example `bean`, `log`, ...).

properties.name: camel.opentelemetry2.exclude-patterns
properties.description: Sets exclude pattern(s) that will disable tracing for Camel processors that matches the pattern. Multiple patterns can be separated by comma.

properties.name: camel.opentelemetry2.include-patterns
properties.description: Sets include pattern(s) that will explicitly enable tracing for Camel processors that matches the pattern. Multiple patterns can be separated by comma. All processors included by default if nothing is specified.

properties.name: camel.opentelemetry2.trace-custom-id-only
properties.description: Setting this to true will only create trace spans for routes and nodes that have a custom id assigned.

properties.name: camel.opentelemetry2.trace-headers-inclusion
properties.description: Setting this to true will include the message headers in the trace spans.

properties.name: camel.opentelemetry2.trace-processors
properties.description: Setting this to true will create new telemetry spans for each Camel custom Processors. Use the excludePattern property to filter out Processors.
